name: PRISONCALL - WF3 DID Change / Prison Transfer

parameters.jsCode:
// Prison DID Lookup for the NEW prison (same source of truth as Workflow 1).
const CSV = `prison_name,prison_state,primary,primary_state,fallback_1,fallback_1_state,fallback_2,fallback_2_state,fallback_3,fallback_3_state
Barwon Prison,vic,Lara,VIC,Werribee,VIC,Melbourne,VIC,,
Beechworth Correctional Centre,vic,Beechworth,VIC,Wangaratta,VIC,Chiltern,VIC,,
Dame Phyllis Frost Centre,vic,Melbourne,VIC,Werribee,VIC,Geelong,VIC,,
Fulham Correctional Centre,vic,Sale,VIC,Traralgon,VIC,Shepparton,VIC,,
Hopkins Correctional Centre,vic,Ararat,VIC,Ballarat,VIC,Horsham,VIC,,
Langi Kal Kal Prison,vic,Beaufort,VIC,Ararat,VIC,Ballarat,VIC,,
Loddon Prison / Middleton Prison,vic,Castlemaine,VIC,Bendigo,VIC,Melbourne,VIC,,
Marngoneet Correctional Centre,vic,Lara,VIC,Werribee,VIC,Melbourne,VIC,,
Melbourne Assessment Prison,vic,Melbourne,VIC,Werribee,VIC,Geelong,VIC,,
Metropolitan Remand Centre,vic,Melbourne,VIC,Werribee,VIC,Geelong,VIC,,
Port Phillip Prison,vic,Melbourne,VIC,Werribee,VIC,Geelong,VIC,,
Ravenhall Correctional Centre,vic,Melbourne,VIC,Werribee,VIC,Geelong,VIC,,
Tarrengower Prison,vic,Castlemaine,VIC,Bendigo,VIC,Melbourne,VIC,,
Western Plains Correctional Centre,vic,Lara,VIC,Werribee,VIC,Melbourne,VIC,,
Amber Laurel CC,nsw,Penrith,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,Sydney,NSW,,
Balund-a,nsw,Lismore,NSW,Grafton,NSW,Coffs Harbour,NSW,,
Bathurst CC,nsw,Bathurst,NSW,Orange,NSW,Lithgow,NSW,,
Broken Hill CC,nsw,Broken Hill,NSW,Dubbo,NSW,,,,
Cessnock CC,nsw,Cessnock,NSW,Maitland,NSW,Newcastle,NSW,,
Clarence CC,nsw,Grafton,NSW,Lismore,NSW,Coffs Harbour,NSW,,
Cooma CC,nsw,Cooma,NSW,Goulburn,NSW,Bega,NSW,,
Dawn de Loas CC,nsw,Sydney,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,,,,
Dillwynia CC,nsw,Penrith,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,Sydney,NSW,,
Emu Plains CC,nsw,Penrith,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,Sydney,NSW,,
Geoffrey Pearce CC,nsw,Penrith,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,Sydney,NSW,,
Glen Innes CC,nsw,Glen Innes,NSW,Armidale,NSW,Tamworth,NSW,,
Goulburn CC,nsw,Goulburn,NSW,Bowral,NSW,Cooma,NSW,,
Hunter CC,nsw,Cessnock,NSW,Maitland,NSW,Newcastle,NSW,,
John Morony CC,nsw,Blacktown,NSW,Sydney,NSW,,,,
Junee CC,nsw,Wagga Wagga,NSW,Goulburn,NSW,Albury - Wodonga,NSW,,
Kariong Intake & Transit,nsw,Gosford,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,Sydney,NSW,,
Kirkconnell CC,nsw,Bathurst,NSW,Young,NSW,Orange,NSW,,
Lithgow CC,nsw,Lithgow,NSW,Bathurst,NSW,Orange,NSW,,
Long Bay Complex,nsw,Sydney,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,,,,
Macquarie CC,nsw,Dubbo,NSW,Orange,NSW,Bathurst,NSW,,
Mannus CC,nsw,Tooma,NSW,Talbingo,NSW,Albury - Wodonga,NSW,Goulburn,NSW
Mary Wade CC,nsw,Sydney,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,,,,
Mid North Coast CC (Kempsey),nsw,Kempsey,NSW,Coffs Harbour,NSW,Port Macquarie,NSW,,
MRRC Silverwater,nsw,Sydney,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,,,,
Oberon CC,nsw,Bathurst,NSW,Lithgow,NSW,Orange,NSW,,
Parklea CC,nsw,Sydney,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,,,,
Shortland CC,nsw,Cessnock,NSW,Maitland,NSW,Newcastle,NSW,,
Silverwater CC (Men's),nsw,Sydney,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,,,,
Silverwater Women's CC,nsw,Sydney,NSW,Blacktown,NSW,,,,
South Coast CC,nsw,Kiama,NSW,Wollongong,NSW,Goulburn,NSW,,
St Heliers CC,nsw,Muswellbrook,NSW,Maitland,NSW,Newcastle,NSW,,
Tamworth CC,nsw,Tamworth,NSW,Armidale,NSW,Glen Innes,NSW,,
Wellington CC,nsw,Dubbo,NSW,Orange,NSW,Bathurst,NSW,,`;
const townPrefix = {
  'Lara': '034224', 'Werribee': '038000', 'Melbourne': '037057', 'Beechworth': '034714',
  'Wangaratta': '035721', 'Chiltern': '035726', 'Geelong': '034232', 'Sale': '034159',
  'Traralgon': '035176', 'Shepparton': '034804', 'Ararat': '034328', 'Ballarat': '035300',
  'Horsham': '034336', 'Beaufort': '034329', 'Castlemaine': '034430', 'Bendigo': '034428',
  'Penrith': '024702', 'Blacktown': '028609', 'Sydney': '029178', 'Lismore': '025624',
  'Grafton': '026632', 'Coffs Harbour': '025603', 'Bathurst': '025340', 'Orange': '026325',
  'Lithgow': '025322', 'Broken Hill': '028013', 'Dubbo': '025836', 'Cessnock': '024012',
  'Maitland': '024072', 'Newcastle': '024940', 'Cooma': '026422', 'Goulburn': '023813',
  'Bega': '026492', 'Glen Innes': '025768', 'Armidale': '026714', 'Tamworth': '025781',
  'Bowral': '024879', 'Gosford': '024313', 'Young': '026382', 'Kempsey': '025504',
  'Port Macquarie': '026583', 'Kiama': '024216', 'Wollongong': '024217', 'Muswellbrook': '026535',
  'Wagga Wagga': '', 'Albury - Wodonga': '', 'Tooma': '', 'Talbingo': ''
};
const d = $json;
const lines = CSV.trim().split('\n');
const headers = lines[0].split(',');
const rows = lines.slice(1).map((l) => { const c = l.split(','); const o = {}; headers.forEach((h, i) => { o[h] = (c[i] || '').trim(); }); return o; });
const norm = (s) => String(s || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
let row = rows.find((r) => r.prison_name.toLowerCase() === String(d.prison_name).toLowerCase());
if (!row) row = rows.find((r) => norm(r.prison_name) === norm(d.prison_name));
if (!row) throw new Error('Prison not found in DID lookup table: ' + d.prison_name);
const exchanges = [row.primary, row.fallback_1, row.fallback_2, row.fallback_3].filter((t) => t && t.length).map((t) => ({ town: t, prefix: townPrefix[t] || '' }));
return [{ json: { ...d, exchanges: exchanges, request_prefix: (exchanges[0] && exchanges[0].prefix) || '', request_postcode: '' } }];

nodes.name: Mock: Add New DID to Extension

parameters.subject: =Please confirm your new Prisoncall number
parameters.bodyContent:
=Hi,

Your new Prisoncall number {{ $json.did }} for {{ $json.prison_name }} should now be working.

Please confirm it is receiving calls. Your previous number will be switched off tomorrow (end of the 15-day overlap).

If the new number is not working, reply to this email immediately.

Thanks,
The Prisoncall Team

nodes.name: Mock: Remove Old DID from Extension

parameters.content:
## Workflow 3 - DID Change / Prison Transfer
Trigger: customer-portal DID change request webhook (/did-change). Built after WF1 + WF2 (it combines both).

- Order the NEW DID (same DID ordering logic as WF1) and mock-add it to the existing 3CX extension.
- **Day 0**: both old + new DIDs active (15-day overlap - NON-NEGOTIABLE).
- **Day 14**: SMS + email asking the customer to confirm the new number works.
- **Day 15**: mock remove old DID from 3CX, then release old DID from VoipLine (2-step).

main.node: Mock: Add New DID to Extension
Mock: Remove Old DID from Extension
